prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约17580→18754→20672→19537→20901名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年累计后移约3321名；2025年基准约20901名，较2024年回 升约1364名，但仍处于近年高位；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划：2021年32人、2022年35人、2023年34人、2024年36人、2025年31人；2026年计划33人， 较2025年扩招2人（增幅约6.5%），扩招将导致竞争略有缓解，位次数字相应后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第70名 ，近年排名稳定在64–70区间，属于中上水平综合性大学；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报抄袭事件，学校已成立工作 专班调查，该事件可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音综合热度排名第81位，评价为一般，未出现明显热度推高信号；近年无显著投档断档记录；第五轮学 科评估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-，均为该校王牌学科；物理类招生专业中计算机类、软件工程等与优势学科关联紧密，对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，西北大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、软件工程、智能科学与技术等热门方向，有利于吸引高分 考生；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约393700人，较2025年（历史类+物理类合计约391238人）小幅增加约0.6%，竞争略有加剧；西北大学位于陕西省西安市，属西北地区综合性大学，在湖北省属于跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次20901名、2026年扩招约6.5%（位次后移约809名）、湖北省考生总数小幅增加（竞争略加剧）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）、热门专 业吸引力（部分抵消）等因素，结合考生规模与声誉做有限修正后，预测2026年物理类最低位次约21725名，区间21225–22225名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17580 → 18754 → 20672 → 19537 → 20901, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3321 positions in the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 20901, an increase of about 1364 positions compared to 2024, but still at a high level in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province: 32 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 31 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33, an increase of 2 students (about 6.5%) compared to 2025, which will slightly ease competition and correspondingly shift the ranking numbers backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 70th in the 2026 main list of the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with stable rankings in the 64–70 range in recent years, making it an upper-middle-level comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts, for which the university has established a special task force to investigate; this incident may have a slight inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 81st, rated as average, with no obvious signal of increased popularity; there have been no significant records of enrollment gaps in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology was rated A, Archaeology was rated A, and Software Engineering was rated A-, all of which are the university's flagship disciplines; among the majors enrolled in Physics Category, Computer Science, Software Engineering, etc., are closely related to the advantageous disciplines, attracting some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended in social popularity; Northwest University's Physics Category enrollment includes popular directions like Computer Science, Software Engineering, and Intelligent Science and Technology, which help attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 393,700, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category total about 391,238), leading to slightly intensified competition; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, a comprehensive university in the northwest region, and it recruits across provinces in Hubei.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 20901, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.5% (ranking shift backward by about 809 positions), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province (slightly intensified competition), a slightly negative reputation (mild inhibition), and the attractiveness of popular majors (partial offset), after limited corrections considering candidate scale and reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 21725, with a range of 21225–22225.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)

- Intelligent Science and Technology (New Major)
- Computer Science and Technology (Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class)

Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (Applied Physics, Materials Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Applied Statistics)

- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmaceutical Engineering, Energy Chemical Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geology (Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Biomedical Science
- Geographical Sciences (Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science)
- Finance (Kaiyuan Securities Intelligent Finance Experimental Class)
- Digital Economy
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 21725, with a range of 21225–22225. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Intelligent Science and Technology) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Geology, Food Science and Engineering, etc.) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<21225) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>22225) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3454 → 3353 → 3561 → 4012 → 5213, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2025 with a significant shift of about 1201 places compared to 2024; the 2025 baseline is about 5213; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province: 15 students in 2021, 12 students from 2022 to 2025; the 2026 plan remains 12 students, unchanged from 2025, with no impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 70th in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 81st, rated as average; no significant enrollment gaps in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Archaeology was rated A, Geology A, Software Engineering A-; among History Category majors, Archaeology is an A-level flagship discipline, while Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, etc., though not individually rated, are traditional advantageous directions of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category majors, Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese/Chinese Language) has a relatively high social popularity recommendation, Economics (National Top-Notch Base) belongs to the finance/economics category with divided opinions, Public Administration, Philosophy, etc., have average popularity; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated History Category of about 141,732 based on recent proportions; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Hubei; local enrollment proportion data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5213, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, the continuous backward trend in recent years (especially the significant shift of 1201 places in 2025), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province, and limited corrections based on candidate scale and historical trends, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5243, with a range of 4743–5743.
